languages.text: "Правильно, Лорд-капитан, тетушка Идира плохого не посоветует!"

traits.locale_text: "Правильно, Лорд-капитан, тетушка Идира плохого не посоветует!"

languages.text: "Quite right, Lord Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you bad advice!"
languages.original_text: "Правильно, Лорд-капитан, тетушка Идира плохого не посоветует!"

traits.locale_text: "Quite right, Lord-Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you poor counsel!"
"Quite right, Lord Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you bad advice!"
"The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"
"Quite right, Lord-Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you poor counsel!"
"Quite right, Lord Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you bad advice!"

languages.text: 「ささやきが言うには…ええ、やってみろ。10人中1人でも我々には十分だ、{name}。私にとっては良い取引のように思えるが、どうだろう」
languages.original_text: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"

traits.locale_text: 「ささやきが言うには…ええ、やってみろ。10人中1人でも我々には十分だ、{name}。私にとっては良い取引のように思えるが、どうだろう？」

languages.text: «Toda la razón, Lord Capitán. ¡La tita Idira nunca le ofrecería un mal consejo!».
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Lord Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you bad advice!"

traits.locale_text: «Toda la razón, Lord Capitán. ¡La tita Idira nunca le ofrecería un mal consejo!».

languages.text: “这就对了，舰长大人。伊迪拉阿姨从来不出馊主意！”
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Lord Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you bad advice!"

traits.locale_text: “这就对了，舰长大人。伊迪拉阿姨从来不出馊主意！”

languages.text: "Das stimmt, Lord Captain. Tante Idira würde Euch nie einen schlechten Rat geben!"
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Lord Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you bad advice!"

traits.locale_text: "Das stimmt, Lord Captain. Tante Idira würde Euch nie einen schlechten Rat geben!"

languages.text: "Çok doğru Lord Kaptan. İdira Teyzen sana asla kötü tavsiye vermez!"
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Lord Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you bad advice!"

traits.locale_text: "Çok doğru Lord Kaptan. İdira Teyzen sana asla kötü tavsiye vermez!"

languages.text: « Vous avez raison, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Tante Idira a toujours été très bonne conseillère ! »
languages.original_text: "Quite right, Lord Captain. Auntie Idira would never give you bad advice!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez raison, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Tante Idira a toujours été très bonne conseillère ! »
